## ProductionTools.IFillingSlotManagerProps.onAddFillingOption property

Callback when user wants to add a new filling option to a slot. If not provided, the "Add filling option" button is hidden. The callback should open a picker and call actions.addFillingOption() with the selected option.

**Signature:**

```typescript
onAddFillingOption?: (slotId: SlotId) => void;
```
